heading: Make a donation
patreon: Recurring donations help us plan for the future and keep Parabola Center going strong. Please consider becoming one of our monthly supporters, who receive special benefits on Patreon for sustaining our work. Because we do not accept funds from the corporations that dominate the industries we work on — from publicly traded marijuana companies and Big Tobacco to Big Tech — we pay our bills with small donations from people like you.
content:
Your support helps make policy that centers consumers, workers, and small businesses and ensures that the benefits of emerging industries — from marijuana to artificial intelligence — go back to the communities most affected by them. Instead of letting powerful corporations hijack each new market, we work to keep the power with the people. By making a tax-exempt donation, you advance our mission to give everyone the access and expertise to participate in shaping these industries.

Parabola Center for Law and Policy is a 501(c)(3), tax-exempt organization, ID# 87-3636074.
